---
pagetitle: "Publications | Jubayer Hossain"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
comments: false
callout-icon: false
toc: true
toc-depth: 1
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(yaml)
library(dplyr)

# Read publications data
publications_data <- yaml::read_yaml("../_data/publications.yml")

# Function to consolidate all publications into a single list with metadata
consolidate_publications <- function(data) {
  all_pubs <- list()

  # Helper function to process each section
  process_section <- function(section_data, category) {
    if (!is.null(section_data)) {
      for (pub in section_data) {
        # Set default status based on citation content (if citation exists)
        status <- "Published"
        citation_text <- if (!is.null(pub$citation)) pub$citation else ""

        if (grepl("\\[Under Review\\]", citation_text)) {
          status <- "Under Review"
        } else if (grepl("\\[In Preparation\\]", citation_text)) {
          status <- "In Preparation"
        } else if (grepl("Presented at", citation_text)) {
          status <- "Presented"
        }

        pub$status_normalized <- status
        pub$category <- category
        all_pubs <<- append(all_pubs, list(pub))
      }
    }
  }

  # Process all sections
  process_section(data$gbd_collaborator, "GBD Collaborator")
  process_section(data$peer_reviewed, "Peer-Reviewed")
  process_section(data$under_review, "Under Review")
  process_section(data$working_papers, "Working Papers")
  process_section(data$conference, "Conference")

  # Sort by featured status first, then by year (newest first), then by citation
  if (length(all_pubs) > 0) {
    featured_vec <- sapply(all_pubs, function(x) if (!is.null(x$featured) && x$featured) 1 else 0)
    years_vec <- sapply(all_pubs, function(x) as.numeric(x$year))
    citation_vec <- sapply(all_pubs, function(x) if (!is.null(x$citation)) x$citation else if (!is.null(x$title)) x$title else "")
    all_pubs <- all_pubs[order(-featured_vec, -years_vec, citation_vec)]
  }

  return(all_pubs)
}

# Function to render publication card with modern styling
render_publication <- function(pub, type = "peer_reviewed") {
  # Determine card classes
  card_classes <- "publication-card"
  if (!is.null(pub$featured) && pub$featured) {
    card_classes <- paste(card_classes, "featured")
  }

  # Create badges
  badges <- ""
  if (!is.null(pub$featured) && pub$featured) {
    badges <- '<div class="publication-badge featured">Featured</div>'
  }
  if (!is.null(pub$status_normalized)) {
    badges <- paste0(badges, '<div class="publication-badge ', tolower(gsub(" ", "-", pub$status_normalized)), '">', pub$status_normalized, '</div>')
  }

  # Format citation - make Hossain, M.J. bold
  citation_text <- if (!is.null(pub$citation)) pub$citation else if (!is.null(pub$title)) pub$title else ""
  citation_formatted <- gsub("Hossain, M.J.", "<strong>Hossain, M.J.</strong>", citation_text, fixed = TRUE)

  # Create tags
  tags_html <- ""
  if (!is.null(pub$tags) && length(pub$tags) > 0) {
    tags_list <- paste0('<li>', pub$tags, '</li>', collapse = '')
    tags_html <- paste0('<ul class="publication-tags">', tags_list, '</ul>')
  }

  # Create year badge
  year_badge <- if (!is.null(pub$year)) paste0('<div class="publication-year">', pub$year, '</div>') else ""

  # Render the card with enhanced classes
  cat('<div class="', card_classes, '">')
  cat('<div class="publication-header">')
  cat(badges)
  cat(year_badge)
  cat('</div>')
  cat('<div class="publication-content">')
  cat('<div class="publication-citation">', citation_formatted, '</div>')
  cat(tags_html)
  cat('</div>')
  cat('</div>')
}

# Get all publications
all_publications <- consolidate_publications(publications_data)
```

```{css}
#| echo: false

/* Enhanced Publication Cards with Modern Design */
.publication-card {
  background: var(--bg-primary, var(--bs-body-bg));
  padding: 2rem;
  border-radius: 16px;
  border: 1px solid var(--border-light, var(--bs-border-color));
  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px var(--shadow-light, rgba(0,0,0,0.1));
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

.publication-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-4px);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 40px var(--shadow-medium, rgba(0,0,0,0.15));
  border-color: var(--primary-color, var(--bs-primary));
}

.publication-card.featured {
  border-color: var(--primary-color, var(--bs-primary));
  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px var(--shadow-primary, rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.15));
}

.publication-card.featured::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  height: 4px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--primary-color, var(--bs-primary)), var(--primary-light, var(--bs-primary-bg)));
}

.publication-header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.5rem;
}

.publication-badge {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 0.4rem 1rem;
  border-radius: 20px;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-right: 0.5rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
}

.publication-badge.featured {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffc107, #ff8c00);
  color: #000;
}

.publication-badge.published {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #16a34a, #15803d);
  color: white;
}

.publication-badge.under-review {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #dc2626, #b91c1c);
  color: white;
}

.publication-badge.in-preparation {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #9333ea, #7c3aed);
  color: white;
}

.publication-badge.presented {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #059669, #047857);
  color: white;
}

.publication-year {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary-color, var(--bs-primary)), var(--primary-dark, var(--bs-primary)));
  color: white;
  padding: 0.4rem 1rem;
  border-radius: 20px;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
}

.publication-citation {
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  text-align: justify;
  color: var(--text-primary, var(--bs-body-color));
}

.publication-tags {
  list-style: none;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.5rem;
}

.publication-tags li {
  background: var(--primary-subtle, var(--bs-primary-bg));
  color: var(--primary-color, var(--bs-primary));
  padding: 0.3rem 0.8rem;
  border-radius: 12px;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  border: 1px solid rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.2);
  transition: all 0.2s ease;
}

.publication-tags li:hover {
  background: var(--primary-color, var(--bs-primary));
  color: white;
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}

/* Publications Section Layout */
.publications-section {
  margin-bottom: 4rem;
}

.publications-section h3 {
  font-size: 2rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--text-primary, var(--bs-body-color));
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

/* Publication Filters */
.publication-filters {
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
  padding: 2rem;
  background: var(--bs-secondary-bg);
  border-radius: 16px;
  border: 1px solid var(--bs-border-color);
}

.filter-group {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.filter-group:last-child {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.filter-btn {
  background: white;
  border: 2px solid var(--bs-border-color);
  color: var(--bs-body-color);
  padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem;
  border-radius: 25px;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
}

.filter-btn:hover {
  background: var(--bs-primary);
  border-color: var(--bs-primary);
  color: white;
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.3);
}

.filter-btn.active {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--bs-primary), var(--bs-primary-dark, #1e40af));
  border-color: var(--bs-primary);
  color: white;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.4);
}

.publications-container {
  position: relative;
}

.publication-item {
  transition: all 0.5s ease;
  opacity: 1;
  transform: scale(1);
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

.publication-item.hidden {
  opacity: 0;
  transform: scale(0.8);
  height: 0;
  margin: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
}

/* Animation for filter transitions */
.publication-item.filtering-out {
  animation: fadeOut 0.3s ease forwards;
}

.publication-item.filtering-in {
  animation: fadeIn 0.3s ease forwards;
}

@keyframes fadeOut {
  to {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0.8);
    height: 0;
    margin: 0;
  }
}

@keyframes fadeIn {
  from {
    opacity: 0;
    transform: scale(0.8);
  }
  to {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1);
  }
}

/* Filter result counter */
.filter-results {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 1rem;
  color: var(--bs-secondary);
  font-style: italic;
}

/* Responsive Design */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .publication-card {
    padding: 1.5rem;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }

  .publication-header {
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 1rem;
  }

  .publication-badge,
  .publication-year {
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    padding: 0.3rem 0.8rem;
  }

  .publication-filters {
    padding: 1.5rem;
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
  }

  .filter-btn {
    padding: 0.6rem 1.2rem;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
  }

  .filter-group {
    gap: 0.5rem;
  }
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

// Publication filter functionality
{
  const filterButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn');
  const publicationItems = document.querySelectorAll('.publication-item');

  // Filter function
  function filterPublications(filterValue) {
    publicationItems.forEach(item => {
      if (filterValue === 'all' || item.classList.contains(filterValue)) {
        item.classList.remove('hidden');
        item.classList.add('filtering-in');
        item.classList.remove('filtering-out');
      } else {
        item.classList.add('filtering-out');
        item.classList.remove('filtering-in');
        setTimeout(() => {
          item.classList.add('hidden');
        }, 300);
      }
    });

    // Update active button
    filterButtons.forEach(btn => {
      btn.classList.remove('active');
    });
    document.querySelector(`[data-filter="${filterValue}"]`).classList.add('active');

    // Show result count
    updateResultCount(filterValue);
  }

  // Result counter
  function updateResultCount(filterValue) {
    const visibleItems = document.querySelectorAll(`.publication-item${filterValue === 'all' ? '' : '.' + filterValue}`);
    const resultContainer = document.querySelector('.filter-results');

    if (!resultContainer) {
      const container = document.createElement('div');
      container.className = 'filter-results';
      document.querySelector('.publications-container').parentNode.insertBefore(container, document.querySelector('.publications-container'));
    }

    const count = visibleItems.length;
    const resultText = count === 1 ? '1 publication found' : `${count} publications found`;
    document.querySelector('.filter-results').textContent = filterValue === 'all' ? '' : resultText;
  }

  // Add event listeners
  filterButtons.forEach(button => {
    button.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const filterValue = button.getAttribute('data-filter');
      filterPublications(filterValue);
    });
  });

  return "Publication filters initialized";
}
```

## Publications

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

# Display hero section
if (!is.null(publications_data$hero)) {
  cat("### ", publications_data$hero$title, "\n\n")
  if (!is.null(publications_data$hero$subtitle)) {
    cat(publications_data$hero$subtitle, "\n\n")
  }
}

# Create filter buttons
filter_categories <- unique(sapply(all_publications, function(x) x$category))
filter_statuses <- unique(sapply(all_publications, function(x) x$status_normalized))

cat('<div class="publication-filters">')
cat('<div class="filter-group">')
cat('<button class="filter-btn active" data-filter="all">All Publications</button>')
for (cat_name in filter_categories) {
  if (!is.null(cat_name) && cat_name != "") {
    btn_id <- tolower(gsub("[^a-zA-Z0-9]", "-", cat_name))
    cat('<button class="filter-btn" data-filter="', btn_id, '">', cat_name, '</button>')
  }
}
cat('</div>')
cat('<div class="filter-group">')
for (status in filter_statuses) {
  if (!is.null(status) && status != "") {
    btn_id <- tolower(gsub("[^a-zA-Z0-9]", "-", status))
    cat('<button class="filter-btn" data-filter="', btn_id, '">', status, '</button>')
  }
}
cat('</div>')
cat('</div>')

# Render all publications with filter attributes
cat('<div class="publications-container">')
if (length(all_publications) > 0) {
  for (pub in all_publications) {
    # Create filter classes
    filter_classes <- c("publication-item")
    if (!is.null(pub$category)) {
      filter_classes <- c(filter_classes, tolower(gsub("[^a-zA-Z0-9]", "-", pub$category)))
    }
    if (!is.null(pub$status_normalized)) {
      filter_classes <- c(filter_classes, tolower(gsub("[^a-zA-Z0-9]", "-", pub$status_normalized)))
    }

    cat('<div class="', paste(filter_classes, collapse = " "), '">')
    render_publication(pub)
    cat('</div>')
  }
} else {
  cat("No publications found.")
}
cat('</div>')
```
